snippet.title: Bridgerton Season 4 | Part 2 Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
True love is worth the risk. Bridgerton Season 4 returns February 26th.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81511877

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Bridgerton Season 4 | Part 2 Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

In a new tale from the ton, eternal bachelor Benedict Bridgerton finally meets his match: a captivating lady's maid in disguise at a masquerade ball.

snippet.title: God of War Sons of Sparta - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Available on PS5® today! 
 
God of War Sons of Sparta is a 2D action platformer with a canon story set in Kratos’ youth during his brutal training at the Spartan Agoge alongside his brother Deimos. 
 
They must overcome threats that will put all their training to the test while confronting the true meaning of duty and honor. 
 
Developed by Mega Cat Studios in partnership with Santa Monica Studio.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #godofwar #godofwarsonsofsparta #sonsofsparta #GoWsonsofsparta #GoWSoS #RetroGames

snippet.title: Hermitcraft 11: Episode 11 - MEGA CITY
snippet.description:
In this episode of Hermitcraft S11, Mumbo starts work on the new mega base that sits overhanging his Minecraft survival starter base. This gigantic Minecraft mega build is inspired by dystopian cities, multiple video games and a bunch more.

My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/officialmumbo

Inspiration for the builds:
Thom Yorke - Last I heard (He Was circling the drain)
MUSIC VIDEO: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I03xFqbxUp8
Directors: Saad Moosajee, Santiago Carrasquilla, Jos Diaz Contreras
Prod. Co: https://www.madeatartcamp.com/work/thom-yorke

Blade Runner 2049 (EXPLICIT)
Directed by: Denis Villeneuve
Cinematographer: Roger Deakins
Production Design: Dennis Gassner

Love, Death and Robots (EXPLICIT)
The Witness
Director: Alberto Mielgo
Production Designer: Alberto Mielgo

The Windshield Wiper (EXPLICIT)
Director: Alberto Mielgo
Production Designer: Alberto Mielgo

Love, Death and Robots (EXPLICIT)
Suits
Director: Franck Balson

A Short Hike: Indy Game
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1055540/A_Short_Hike/

https://www.adamgryu.com/

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Official Reveal Trailer | State of Play 2026
snippet.description:
Keanu Reeves is back as John Wick, but this time in a currently untitled game from Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski. The story will be an original script set in the John Wick timeline, and it will expand on the lore with familiar characters and brand-new ones. Get ready for "a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments." 

#ign #Gaming #PlayStation

localized.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Official Reveal Trailer | State of Play 2026
localized.description:
Keanu Reeves is back as John Wick, but this time in a currently untitled game from Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski. The story will be an original script set in the John Wick timeline, and it will expand on the lore with familiar characters and brand-new ones. Get ready for "a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments." 

#ign #Gaming #PlayStation

Lyrics: 
She drinks wine by the glass, not by the bottle
She ain't stuck on the past, ain't worried about tomorrow
She's a lover, a mother, a sister and wife
She rolls over in the morning to the love of her life
Only smokes one on vacation, says just what she thinks
She don’t need validation or much of anything

I just wanna be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so
I just wanna be her
I just wanna be her
I just wanna to be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so
I just wanna be her
I just wanna be her so bad
It hurts so bad

She knows being rich is just a state of mind
She stays talking to Jesus, calls her mama all the time
She don’t over embellish
If she says it, then it's true
I don't mean to sound jealous, but what could I do 'cause

I just wanna be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so
I just wanna be her
I just wanna be her
I just wanna to be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so
I just wanna be her
I just wanna be her

Don't want all this drama, give me something real
Trade a mile high to walk one in her heels
Take all my money, everything I have
I just wanna be her, I just wanna be her so bad
It hurts so bad

I just wanna be her
I just wanna be her

I just wanna be her

Don't want all this drama, give me something real.
Trade a mile high to walk one in her heels
Take all my money, everything I have

I just wanna be her, I just wanna be her so bad
It hurts so bad
I just wanna be her
I just wanna be her so bad
Yeah it hurts so bad 

#EllaLangley #BeHer

snippet.title: Resident Evil Requiem - 4th Trailer
snippet.description:
Requiem for the dead. Nightmare for the living.

Resident Evil Requiem is now available for pre-order! Experience terrifying survival horror with FBI analyst Grace Ashcroft, and dive into pulse-pounding action with legendary agent Leon S. Kennedy. Both of their journeys and unique gameplay styles intertwine into a heart-stopping, emotional experience that will chill you to your core.
 
A new era of survival horror begins when Resident Evil Requiem launches February 27, 2026 for PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, Steam, Epic Games Store and GeForce NOW.

Pre-order: https://www.residentevil.com/requiem/en-us/products

For more official news and updates, follow us on:
https://www.residentevil.com/requiem
https://twitter.com/re_games 
http://www.facebook.com/residentevil 
https://www.instagram.com/re_games

snippet.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer™ - Official Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Star Wars: Galactic Racer™ is a high-stakes, high-octane reinvention of racing born in the lawless Outer Rim of the Star Wars™ galaxy. Coming to PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC in 2026.
 
A new racer has arrived to the Galactic League: an unsanctioned racing circuit where only the bold survive.
 
For Shade, a lone racer with a dream of glory and revenge, the League isn't just a race; it's a shot at reclaiming destiny.
 
Wishlist today!
 
Visit the official website and follow for updates on social media:
 
Official Site - [URL https://starwarsgalacticracer.com/]
Instagram - [handle @starwarsgalacticracer]
X - [handle https://x.com/SWGalacticRacer]
TikTok - [handle @starwarsgalacticracer]
Facebook - [handle https://www.facebook.com/SWGalacticRacer]

en.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer™ - Official Gameplay Trailer
en.description:
Star Wars: Galactic Racer™ is a high-stakes, high-octane reinvention of racing born in the lawless Outer Rim of the Star Wars™ galaxy. Coming to PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC in 2026.
 
A new racer has arrived to the Galactic League: an unsanctioned racing circuit where only the bold survive.
 
For Shade, a lone racer with a dream of glory and revenge, the League isn't just a race; it's a shot at reclaiming destiny.
 
Wishlist today!
 
Visit the official website and follow for updates on social media:

snippet.title: ROBLOX ESCAPE POLICE FOR BRAINROTS..
snippet.description:
Today I escaped police for brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Launch Gameplay Trailer | Marathon
snippet.description:
Mayday. Mayday. 
MAYDAY. 
MAYD ~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"?~~~~~~~ 

Marathon releases March 5, 2026. 

Play Marathon in the Server Slam weekend from February 26, 2026 to March 2, 2026. This open preview weekend* is available worldwide on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save. 

Learn more: https://bung.ie/4654oFP

Pre-order Marathon now: 
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/ 
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ 
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b 

Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny. 

Follow Marathon: 
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame 
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame 
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net 
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame 
 
Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and unpredictable environments. Play with your crew, as a solo Runner, or form uneasy alliances with proximity chat. Scavenge, buildcraft, and take on greater challenges–culminating with the derelict Marathon ship hanging above. 

*Gameplay requires internet access and paid-for subscription on console (sold separately)

de.title: SPIDER-NOIR Official Trailer (2026) Nicolas Cage
de.description:

snippet.title: Forbidden Fruits | Official Trailer ft. Lili Reinhart & Lola Tung | HD | IFC Films
snippet.description:
Free Eden employee Apple secretly runs a witchy femme cult in the basement of the mall store after hours - with fellow fruits Cherry and Fig. But when new hire Pumpkin challenges their performative sisterhood, the women are forced to face their own poisons or succumb to a bloody fate.

Directed by Meredith Alloway
Starring: Lili Reinhart, Lola Tung, Victoria Pedretti, Alexandra Shipp , Emma Chamberlain

snippet.title: Remember the Titans
snippet.description: In Virginia, high school football is a way of life, an institution revered, each game celebrated more lavishly than Christmas, each playoff distinguished more grandly than any national holiday. And with such recognition, comes powerful emotions. In 1971 high school football was everything to the people of Alexandria. But when the local school board was forced to integrate an all black school with an all white school, the very foundation of football's great tradition was put to the test.

snippet.title: SCATTERBRAIN - PHASES (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen/Stream Here: https://link.me/scatterbrain 
Shop SCATTERBRAIN PHASES Merch: https://scatterbrain.com/

Follow SCATTERBRAIN:
Website: https://www.scatterbrain.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/brian.burkheiser/ 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@scatterbrainofficial 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/Bri.Burkheiser 
X: https://x.com/briburkheiser 

Song Credits: 
Writers: Brian Burkheiser, Tyler Smyth, BJ Perry, Erik Ron, Kurt Mackey
Producers: Tyler Smyth, BJ Perry, Erik Ron
Mixing Engineer: Anthony Reeder
Mastering Engineer: Ted Jensen

Music Video Credits:
Directed by: Kurt Mackey, Brian Burkheiser
Written by: Brian Burkheiser, Kurt Mackey, Ben Proulx, Andrew DiLeo
Editor: Kurt Mackey, Andrew DiLeo, Ben Proulx
VFX: Ben Proulx
Camera/Footage: Kurt Mackey, Andrew DiLeo, Ian Urquhart, Aimee Galicia Torres, Murli Dhir, Cassandra Tackett, Christian Skirmont, Brenden Burkheiser
Special thanks to: BJ Perry, Adam Diemond, Rick Smith, Dana Haddad, Caylin Burkheiser, Dr. Adam Rubin, Dr. James Lewerenz, Dr. Ryan Osborne

Lyrics:

So much for a happy ending
Everything suddenly vanished
Can’t find peace of mind I’m damaged
Didn’t go the way I planned it

A fault in the stars
A chemical imbalance
You fucked with my head
And I let you allow it
Believed what you said
Emotional malice
We take what we get
And that’s why

I’ve been on my own
Going through some changes
I’m not gonna lie
Been going through some phases
Every single night
I’ve been getting faded
You don’t write the start
But you control the ending
Now I’m gone

I’ve been on my own
Going through some changes
I’m not gonna lie
Been going through some phases
Every single night
I’ve been getting faded
You don’t write the start
But you control the ending

Cuz’ nights like this they drag on and on
Hope you got everything you ever wanted
Turns out that I just wasn’t good enough
And now I’m barely holding on to something
Something, everybody wants it
Make a lot of people turn their back like it’s nothing
Fame will come up on you
It’s a curse in the night yeah
Put you in the coffin, in the dirt

I’ve been on my own
Going through some changes
I’m not gonna lie
Been going through some phases
Every single night
I’ve been getting faded
Feels a little fucked up
Can’t believe you played me

And now I’m on my own
Going through some changes
I’m not gonna lie
Been going through some phases
Every single night
I’ve been getting faded
You don’t write the start
But you control the ending
Now I’m gone

It’s over 
Over in the blink of an eye
Guess it’s over
I can’t believe you left me to die

It’s not what I wanted
But it’s what I got
Turns out it’s for the best
Things just didn’t work out
Now I gotta let you go
Gotta move on with my life

I’ve been on my own
Going through some changes
I’m not gonna lie
Been going through some phases
Every single night
I’ve been getting faded
You don’t write the start
But you control the ending
Now I’m gone

Distributed by Scatterbrain Records

It’s not what I wanted
But it’s what I got
Turns out it’s for the best
Things just didn’t work out
Now I gotta let you go
Gotta move on with my life

I’ve been on my own
Going through some changes
I’m not gonna lie
Been going through some phases
Every single night
I’ve been getting faded
You don’t write the start
But you control the ending
Now I’m gone

Distributed by Scatterbrain Records

snippet.title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance - Next-Gen Update - Launch trailer
snippet.description:
Experience Henry's journey like never before with Kingdom Come: Deliverance's next-gen update, out now natively for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. Witness the first chapter of Henry’s story and the rise of a young rebel, before the journey continues in Kingdom Come: Deliverance II.
 
Enjoy a massive performance leap with up to 60FPS, ultra-quality settings, and improved visual assets. From Sasau to Rattay, return to 15th-century Bohemia for a smoother, more immersive adventure with seamless cross-generation save transfers.

snippet.title: We've Lost Dale Earnhardt: 25 Years Later
snippet.description: In the 25 years since the death of Dale Earnhardt, much about NASCAR has changed... and much has stayed the same. Earnhardt's friends, competitors, and fans, as well as current drivers, reflect on the Intimidator's life, legacy, and lasting impact.

hi.title: स्पाइडर-नोयर ट्रेलर पर प्रतिक्रिया: ये सीरीज आखिर है क्या?
hi.description:
स्पाइडर-नोयर एक 8-एपिसोड की सीरीज़ है जो 27 मई को प्राइम वीडियो पर (25 मई को MGM+ पर) आ रही है, जिसमें निकोलस केज मुख्य भूमिका में हैं! एरिक वॉस इस ट्रेलर (दोनों वर्शन) पर अपनी प्रतिक्रिया देते हुए बताते हैं कि यह सीरीज़ क्या है और इससे क्या उम्मीद की जा सकती है। हर प्लान के लिए एक ही जूता। वेस्सी स्टॉर्मबर्स्ट बेहद वाटरप्रूफ, हल्का और अप्रत्याशित मौसम के लिए बना है।

snippet.title: ARIA VEGA, Ryan Castro -  CHÉVERE (premium_remix) (Video Oficial)
snippet.description:
ARIA VEGA, Ryan Castro -  CHÉVERE (premium_remix) (Video Oficial)

ARIA VEGA presenta el esperado “CHÉVERE (Premium Remix)” junto a la estrella global Ryan Castro. Tras el fenómeno del sencillo original, que debutó en el No. 13 del Billboard Colombia Hot 100 y superó los 3 millones de reproducciones en Spotify en tiempo récord, la barranquillera une el flow del "Cantante del Ghetto" a su esencia caribeña. Con la producción de SOG, este junte explosivo entre ARIA VEGA y Ryan Castro redefine el sonido de la "Caribbean Life". 

Escucha *CHÉVERE (premium_remix)* en tu plataforma favorita: 
https://wml.link/Chevere-PremiumRMX

de-DE.title: SPIDER-MAN NOIR TRAILER 2026: Sinister Six, Mr. Negative & Marvel Easter Eggs
de-DE.description:
Spider-Man Noir Trailer 2026. Spider-Noir mit Nicholas Cage, den Sinister Six, Mr. Negative, Black Cat, Silvermane, Sandman, Marvel Easter Eggs, Avengers: Doomsday Trailer & Spider-Man: Brand New Day Trailer ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
Spider-Man: Brand New Day Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0qPeNpdeIo0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=5&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC

Henry Cavill Highlander Teaser https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MKhod_ziM0s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=2&pp=iAQB2AbwA7AIAg%3D%3D
Masters of the Universe Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEPEM1BoBuo&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=11&pp=iAQB2AauBLAIAg%3D%3D
Avengers: Doomsday – X-Men Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hz5IpqEri2s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rk_DTMEaE_k&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQB
Notfall: Tolle neue Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Berichterstattung zum neuen Spider-Man Noir Trailer 2026. Neue Spider-Man-Realfilm-Episoden mit Nicolas Cage, der aus Spider-Man Beyond the Spider-Verse zurückkehrt, aber als ein anderer Ben Reilly Spider-Man. Erklärung zu Spider-Man Noir Episode 1, zukünftige Spider-Man-Serien.

Spider-Man Brand New Day: Erster Teaser, Bruce Banner als wilder Hulk, Sadie Sink als neue Figur, Spider-Man gegen Punisher. Wiedersehen von Tom Holland und Jon Bernthal. Erster Blick auf den neuen Spider-Man-Anzug. Hulk-Ankündigung. Warum Bruce Banner Spider-Man helfen würde, Spider-Man gegen Hulk, frühere Hulk-Referenzen in Spider-Man-Filmen. Stan Lees Incredible Hulk und Spider-Man-Realfilm-Crossover in den 1980er Jahren. Scorpion kehrt zurück, Tombstone, weitere neue Schurken.

Spider-Man: Brand New Day erklärt. Neue Schurken, Tom Hollands Spider-Man-Veränderungen, Verbindung zum Avengers: Doomsday-Trailer. Neue Charaktere, neuer Spider-Man-Anzug. Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse-Trailer. Spider-Man Noir-Trailer, Verbindung zwischen Sadie Sink und Tobey Maguire als Spider-Man.

Avengers: Doomsday-Trailer. Robert Downey Jr. als Doctor Doom, neuer Black Panther, X-Men, Doctor Strange, erster Blick auf Avengers: Secret Wars, Battleworld (MCU). Fantastic Four, Franklin Richards. Ian McKellen als Magneto, Patrick Stewart als Professor X, Kesley Grammer als Beast, Thor kehrt zurück, Mystique, Cyclops, Nightcrawler, die originalen X-Men.

Deadpool- und Wolverine-Easter-Eggs. Warum Marvel das MCU mit Avengers 6: Secret Wars neu startet. Was wird sich mit den Avengers, dem neuen Iron Man, den X-Men-Mutanten wie Wolverine, Deadpool, den Fantastischen Vier, Ghost Rider, Spider-Man und anderen Charakteren ändern? Viele weitere Marvel-Trailer folgen, darunter der Avengers: Doomsday-Trailer und weitere Videos zu Spider-Man: Brand New Day!

Analyse de la nouvelle bande-annonce de Spider-Man Noir (2026). Nouveaux épisodes de Spider-Man en prises de vues réelles avec le retour de Nicolas Cage (de Spider-Man : Au-delà du Spider-Verse) dans le rôle d'un autre Spider-Man, incarné par Ben Reilly. Explication de l'épisode 1 de Spider-Man Noir et perspectives pour les futures séries Spider-Man.

Première image de Spider-Man : Un nouveau jour. Bruce Banner transformé en Hulk. Nouveau personnage : Sadie Sink. Spider-Man contre le Punisher. Retrouvailles entre Tom Holland et Jon Bernthal. Premier aperçu du nouveau costume de Spider-Man. Annonce concernant Hulk. Pourquoi Bruce Banner aiderait-il Spider-Man ? Spider-Man contre Hulk. Références à Hulk dans les films Spider-Man. Le crossover entre L'Incroyable Hulk et Spider-Man en prises de vues réelles de Stan Lee dans les années 1980. Le Retour du Scorpion, Tombstone et d'autres nouveaux méchants.

Explication de Spider-Man : Un Nouveau Jour. Nouveaux méchants, changements pour le Spider-Man de Tom Holland, lien avec la bande-annonce d'Avengers : Doomsday. Nouveaux personnages, nouveau costume de Spider-Man. Bande-annonce de Spider-Man : Au-delà du Spider-Verse. Bande-annonce de Spider-Man Noir, lien entre Sadie Sink et Tobey Maguire dans Spider-Man.

Bande-annonce d'Avengers : Doomsday. Robert Downey Jr. dans le rôle du Docteur Fatalis, nouveau Black Panther, X-Men, Docteur Strange, premières images d'Avengers : Secret Wars, Battleworld (MCU). Les Quatre Fantastiques, Franklin Richards. Ian McKellen (Magneto), Patrick Stewart (Professeur X), Kesley Grammer (Beast), Thor : Le Retour, Mystique, Cyclope, Diablo, X-Men originaux.

Clin d'œil à Deadpool et Wolverine. Pourquoi Marvel redémarre le MCU avec Avengers : Secret Wars ? Qu'est-ce qui va changer chez les Avengers, le nouvel Iron Man, les mutants X-Men comme Wolverine, Deadpool, les Quatre Fantastiques, Ghost Rider, Spider-Man et les autres personnages ? De nombreuses autres bandes-annonces Marvel arrivent bientôt ! Découvrez la bande-annonce d'Avengers : Doomsday et d'autres vidéos de Spider-Man : Brand New Day !

Trailer de Lanternas Verdes https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rk_DTMEaE_k&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQB
Vídeos Incríveis de Emergência https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Analisando o novo trailer de Homem-Aranha Noir (2026). Novos episódios live-action do Homem-Aranha com Nicolas Cage retornando de Homem-Aranha: Além do Aranhaverso, mas como um Ben Reilly diferente. Explicação do episódio 1 de Homem-Aranha Noir, futuras séries do Homem-Aranha.

Primeiro teaser de Homem-Aranha: Um Novo Dia, Bruce Banner como Hulk Selvagem, Sadie Sink como nova personagem, Homem-Aranha vs. Justiceiro. Reencontro de Tom Holland e Jon Bernthal. Primeira olhada no novo uniforme do Homem-Aranha. Anúncio do Hulk. Por que Bruce Banner ajudaria o Homem-Aranha, Homem-Aranha vs. Hulk, referências anteriores ao Hulk nos filmes do Homem-Aranha. O crossover entre o Incrível Hulk e o Homem-Aranha de Stan Lee nos anos 80. O retorno do Escorpião, Tombstone e outros novos vilões.

Homem-Aranha: Um Novo Dia Explicado. Novos vilões, mudanças no Homem-Aranha de Tom Holland, conexão com o trailer de Vingadores: O Dia do Juízo Final. Novos personagens, novo uniforme do Homem-Aranha. Trailer de Homem-Aranha Além do Aranhaverso. Trailer de Homem-Aranha Noir, conexão entre Sadie Sink e Tobey Maguire como Homem-Aranha.

Trailer de Vingadores: O Dia do Juízo Final. Robert Downey Jr. como Doutor Destino, novo Pantera Negra, X-Men, Doutor Estranho, primeira olhada em Vingadores: Guerras Secretas, Mundo Bélico no MCU. Quarteto Fantástico, Franklin Richards. Ian McKellen como Magneto, Patrick Stewart como Professor X, Kesley Grammer como Fera, Thor: O Retorno, Mística, Ciclope, Noturno e os X-Men originais.

Referências a Deadpool e Wolverine. Por que a Marvel está reiniciando o MCU com Vingadores 6: Guerras Secretas? O que vai mudar com todos os Vingadores, o novo Homem de Ferro, os mutantes dos X-Men como Wolverine, Deadpool, Quarteto Fantástico, Motoqueiro Fantasma, Homem-Aranha e outros personagens? Muitos outros trailers da Marvel estão chegando! Trailer de Vingadores: O Fim do Mundo, mais vídeos do Homem-Aranha: Um Novo Dia em breve!

hi.title: स्पाइडर-मैन नोयर ट्रेलर 2026: सिनिस्टर सिक्स, मिस्टर नेगेटिव और मार्वल के कुछ छिपे हुए रहस्य
hi.description:
स्पाइडर-मैन नॉयर ट्रेलर 2026। स्पाइडर-नॉयर में निकोलस केज, सिनिस्टर सिक्स, मिस्टर नेगेटिव, ब्लैक कैट, सिल्वरमेन, सैंडमैन, मार्वल ईस्टर एग्स, एवेंजर्स डूम्सडे ट्रेलर और स्पाइडर-मैन ब्रांड न्यू डे ट्रेलर शामिल हैं ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
स्पाइडर-मैन ब्रांड न्यू डे ट्रेलर https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0qPeNpdeIo0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=5&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
नाइट ऑफ द सेवन किंगडम्स एपिसोड 4 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tWlFhBsaBDc&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
हाउस ऑफ द ड्रैगन सीजन फॉलआउट सीज़न 2 का ट्रेलर: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkDLDXCHS2s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
फॉलआउट सीज़न 2 का एपिसोड 8: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=52v_6lRR_Cw&list=PLOIeYdZ3Qczw4IKaQOuhsqjNHq34PAB-d&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
हेनरी कैविल की फिल्म 'हाईलैंडर' का टीज़र https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MKhod_ziM0s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=2&pp=iAQB2AbwA7AIAg%3D%3D
मास्टर्स ऑफ द यूनिवर्स ट्रेलर https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEPEM1BoBuo&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=11&pp=iAQB2AauBLAIAg%3D%3D
एवेंजर्स डूम्सडे एक्स-मेन ट्रेलर https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hz5IpqEri2s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
लैंटर्न्स ट्रेलर https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rk_DTMEaE_k&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQB
इमरजेंसी ऑसम नए वीडियो https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

नए स्पाइडर-मैन नॉयर ट्रेलर 2026 को कवर करते हुए। निकोलस केज के साथ नए लाइव एक्शन स्पाइडर-मैन एपिसोड। स्पाइडर-मैन बियॉन्ड द स्पाइडर-वर्स से वापसी, लेकिन एक अलग बेन रेली स्पाइडर-मैन के रूप में। स्पाइडर-मैन नॉयर एपिसोड 1 की व्याख्या, भविष्य की स्पाइडर-मैन सीरीज़।

स्पाइडर-मैन ब्रांड न्यू डे का पहला टीज़र, ब्रूस बैनर सैवेज हल्क, सैडी सिंक का नया किरदार, स्पाइडर-मैन बनाम पनिशर। टॉम हॉलैंड और जॉन बर्न्थॉल का पुनर्मिलन। नए स्पाइडर-मैन सूट की पहली झलक। हल्क की घोषणा। ब्रूस बैनर स्पाइडर-मैन की मदद क्यों करेगा, स्पाइडर-मैन बनाम हल्क, स्पाइडर-मैन फिल्मों में हल्क के पूर्व संदर्भ। 1980 के दशक में स्टेन ली की इनक्रेडिबल हल्क और स्पाइडर-मैन लाइव एक्शन क्रॉसओवर। स्कॉर्पियन की वापसी, टॉम्बस्टोन, अन्य नए खलनायक।

स्पाइडर-मैन ब्रांड न्यू डे की व्याख्या। नए खलनायक, टॉम हॉलैंड के स्पाइडर-मैन में बदलाव, एवेंजर्स डूम्सडे ट्रेलर से संबंध। नए किरदार, नया स्पाइडर-मैन सूट। स्पाइडर-मैन बियॉन्ड द स्पाइडर-वर्स का ट्रेलर। स्पाइडर-मैन नॉयर का ट्रेलर, सैडी सिंक और टोबी मैगुइरे का स्पाइडर-मैन कनेक्शन।

एवेंजर्स डूम्सडे का ट्रेलर। रॉबर्ट डाउनी जूनियर का डॉक्टर डूम, नया ब्लैक पैंथर, एक्स-मेन, डॉक्टर स्ट्रेंज, एवेंजर्स सीक्रेट वॉर्स की पहली झलक, बैटलवर्ल्ड एमसीयू। फैंटास्टिक फोर, फ्रैंकलिन रिचर्ड्स। इयान मैककेलन का मैग्नेटो, पैट्रिक स्टीवर्ट का प्रोफेसर एक्स, केस्ली ग्रामर का बीस्ट, थॉर रिटर्न्स, मिस्टिक, साइक्लोप्स, नाइटक्रॉलर, ओरिजिनल एक्स-मेन।

डेडपूल और वूल्वरिन के ईस्टर एग्स। मार्वल एवेंजर्स 6 सीक्रेट वॉर्स के साथ एमसीयू को रीबूट क्यों कर रहा है? एवेंजर्स, नए आयरन मैन, एक्स-मेन म्यूटेंट्स जैसे वूल्वरिन, डेडपूल, फैंटास्टिक फोर, घोस्ट राइडर, स्पाइडर-मैन और अन्य किरदारों में क्या बदलाव आने वाले हैं? मार्वल के और भी कई ट्रेलर आ रहे हैं। एवेंजर्स डूम्सडे का ट्रेलर, स्पाइडर-मैन ब्रांड न्यू डे के और भी वीडियो जल्द ही आ रहे हैं!

snippet.title: EVERYTHING You MISSED In CHAPTER 5’S GAMEPLAY TRAILER (Lore and Theories)
snippet.description:
The CHAPTER 5 Gameplay Trailer EXPLAINED (Secrets and Theories)
Chapter 5’s gameplay trailer is finally here and it might’ve just revealed EVERYTHING. In this full breakdown, we go scene by scene analyzing Huggy’s possible death at the hands of the Prototype, the return of old toys like catnap, doey the doughman, and mommy long legs through poppy gel experiments, and our first terrifying look at the Prototype’s stitched face and yellow eye. We dive into the new lab, the massive cave systems, wrongside outimals being rebuilt, living mushroom creatures, and what could be the origin of the poppy gel itself. Plus we break down the brand-new Grab Pack hands, the star walkie talkie mechanics, Lily Lovebraid's hide-and-seek style boss fight, Huggy chase scenes, Boxy Boo hints, the conditioning rooms, and Poppy and Kissy’s capture. Is the Prototype a former Poppy? Are the toys being turned inside out to revive them? And what role does the mysterious memory machine play in all of this? Let’s break down every hidden detail from the Chapter 5 trailer.

If you want the full story and theories connecting it all, this is for you.

Poppy Playtime Chapter 5, Poppy Playtime, Poppy Playtime Chapter 4, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Trailer, Poppy Playtime Chapter 3, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Theory, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Lore, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Trailer Reaction, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Leaks, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Game, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Gameplay, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Release Date, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 New Monster, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 New Toy, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Lily Lovebraids, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Official Trailer, Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 ARG, Chapter 5 ARG

Plus we break down the brand-new Grab Pack hands, the star walkie talkie mechanics, Lily Lovebraid's hide-and-seek style boss fight, Huggy chase scenes, Boxy Boo hints, the conditioning rooms, and Poppy and Kissy’s capture. Is the Prototype a former Poppy? Are the toys being turned inside out to revive them? And what role does the mysterious memory machine play in all of this? Let’s break down every hidden detail from the Chapter 5 trailer.

snippet.title: Grupo Firme — El Beneficio De La Duda (Letra/Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Grupo Firme — El Beneficio De La Duda
Español / Lyrics ✨

╰► 𝗕𝗔𝗦𝗜𝗖 𝗜𝗡𝗙𝗢 ❥
Grupo Firme - El Beneficio De La Duda
Released 27/05/2024
From the album "El Beneficio De La Duda"
#GrupoFirme #regionalmexicano #latin #elbeneficiodeladuda #regional 

🌅 Video de fondo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIgsCYgo5P4

💿 Sigue al artista: (Redes sociales aquí)

🍃 Sígueme a mí (chi?)
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/richii.almazan/
____________________________________

Lyrics de la canción para llorar un ratito:
Sé que ahora lo último que quieres
Es saber cómo me encuentro
Pero por si a caso llegas a pensar en mi un momento
Quiero que sepas que yo también estoy pensando en ti

Y también me queda claro que no te interesan mis historias
La versión mía de los hechos no me llevará a la gloria
Pero de algún modo sé que no me dejaría tan mal

No me merezco el beneficio de la duda
Más lo voy a agradecer si a caso un día me lo regalas
Tú y yo no estamos pa' estar sufriendo por estupideces
Nos podemos arreglar si todavía te quedan ganas
Y no quisiera que me malinterpretaras
Pero a los dos nos conviene que le demos vuelta a la hoja
Se nos va a poner difícil eso de andarle buscando en otras gentes
Otros modos, otros cuerpos, otras bocas

Tú y yo estábamos viviendo algo bonito
Y disculpa si es que te vuelvo a insistir
Solo dame el beneficio de la duda
Y no te vas a arrepentir

No me merezco el beneficio de la duda
Más lo voy a agradecer si a caso un día me lo regalas
Tú y yo no estamos pa' estar sufriendo por estupideces
Nos podemos arreglar si todavía te quedan ganas
Y no quisiera que me malinterpretaras
Pero a los dos nos conviene que le demos vuelta a la hoja
Se nos va a poner difícil eso de andarle buscando en otras gentes
Otros modos, otros cuerpos, otras bocas

Tú y yo estábamos viviendo algo bonito
Y disculpa si es que te vuelvo a insistir
Solo dame el beneficio de la duda
Y no te vas a arrepentir
____________________________________

snippet.title: Romeo Santos, Prince Royce - Dardos (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Music:
https://SML.lnk.to/BetterLateThanNever

Letra/Lyrics: 
Por poquito te olvido de verdad
Y había dejado la bebida
La señal que continúa mi mala racha
Tus llamadas perdidas
Quisiera creer que yo te puedo ignorar
Que no importas tanto
Mi dignidad es un tablero en la pared
Donde tú tiras dardos

Para ser más sincero y certero
Mi signo de cáncer es muy vulnerable para un Leo 
Puede que sea por Venus 
Que no puedo apagar las llamas
Y así me quemo en tu fuego 

Ámame .. sólo un cc por lo menos 
Quiéreme, nada ma’ un Chin Chin te lo ruego

Cuidado, no abuses demasiado 
Comprobado, tú eres un caramelo envenenado

Ámame.. sólo un cc por lo menos 
Quiéreme ..nada ma’ un Chin Chin te lo ruego

Me han voceado
Bachatero a’fixiado, embriagado
Dicen las malas lenguas idiotizado

Para ser más sincero y certero
Mi signo de Cáncer es muy vulnerable para un Leo 
Puede que sea por Venus que no puedo
Apagar las llamas y así me quemo en tu fuego 

Ámame.. sólo un cc por lo menos 
Quiéreme..nada ma’ un Chin Chin te lo ruego

Cuidado, no abuses demasiado 
Comprobado, tú eres un caramelo envenenado

Ámame.. sólo un cc por lo menos 
Quiéreme ..nada ma’ un Chin Chin te lo ruego

Me han voceado
Bachatero a’fixiado, embriagado
Dicen las malas lenguas idiotizado

Ahhhhhhh, I’m not ok
Ya no quiero ser esa burla
No me gusta, que seas tan cruel

Ayyy ayyy, auxilio, ay Dios mío ,
Ayyy ayyy, grito, me haces sufrir 
Si tiras un dardo más, no voy aguantar
Me tiras un dardo más, me vas a matar

Ayyy ayyy, dolores, mal de amores
AAyyyyy voy a llorar mi amor

Si tiras un dardo más voy desangrar
Si tiras un dardo más me vas matar

#RomeoSantos #PrinceRoyce #Dardos 

Official Video by Romeo Santos & Prince Royce performing Dardos.(C) 2026 Sony Music Entertainment US Latin LLC under exclusive license from I Love Amiguita Inc.

snippet.title: 14 Sin Ti 💔- Peso Pluma, Grupo Firme (Video Music)
snippet.description:
🎶ESTA CANCION FUE CREADA CON INTELIGENCIA ARTIFICIAL NO ES UNA COLABORACION/SINGLE OFICIAL.

Contenido editado y alterado con IA y otras herramientas, si alguno de los artistas o sellos que aparecen en el  mashup le llega a molestar me puede contactar y el vídeo será eliminado: contactobelicogpt@gmail.com

🤝 Nos dedicamos a impulsar la creatividad y la innovación musical, asegurando que nuestras colaboraciones respeten los derechos de autor de cada artista. Nuestra misión es crear música nueva y emocionante para compartir, sin ánimo de lucro, brindando a los aficionados de la música mexicana una constante oleada de novedades.

✨ En BelicoGPT, celebramos la diversidad musical y buscamos formar algo extraordinario al unir géneros. Únete a nuestra comunidad y descubre un viaje musical emocionante.

🚨 Aviso de Derechos de Autor: Es crucial destacar que somos los titulares de los derechos de autor de las letras y los beats en nuestras creaciones. Queda estrictamente prohibido cargar estas obras en tiendas digitales bajo otro nombre. Contamos con documentación legal y registros, y tomaremos medidas en caso de reclamaciones DMCA, incluso la eliminación de contenido si se carga sin autorización.

📧 ¿Tienes preguntas, sugerencias o ideas de colaboración? No dudes en contactarnos a través de nuestro correo electrónico: contacto@belicogpt.info.

Suscríbete, activa las notificaciones y sumérgete en la innovación musical de BelicoGPT. 🎤🎵

snippet.title: Maluma, Yeison Jimenez - Con el Corazón (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Letra/Lyrics:

Ok ok ok 
Directamente desde Colombia con ustedes su servidor 
Yeison Jiménez y su parcero Maluma BaBaby

Ya se te olvidó que cuando tú me conociste yo ya era un patán
andaba borracho gastándome toda la plata en la barra del bar
qué andas reclamando, si así me conociste y así ando
ahora no vengas a estarme cambiando

Parece que hubieras olvidado el hombre que te cambió la vida
queriendo que me quede encerrado, si me conociste en la cantina
voy a pedir billete prestado 
pa’ gastármelo todo en tequila
no me pidas que cambie el pasado
yo ya era así
cabrón desde el primer día

Ay ay mamacita 
yo ya no cambié. 
yo tampoco
ni cambiaré mi amor
Díselo Maluma 
Dímelo Yeison
Con el corazón!
Ah no

Y ahí no te quejabas, tampoco jodías
ahora lo que pasa casi siempre es culpa mía 
la verdad no entiendo, tanta hipocresía 
si antes eras tú la que farreabas noche y día

Y ahí no te quejabas, 
y ahí no me decías 
vámonos  pal rancho que se esta haciendo de día
antes me pedías, sirve otro tequila 
y dígale al mariachi que hoy vamos de amanecida

Parece que hubieras olvidado del hombre que te cambio la vida
queriendo que me quede encerrado, si me conociste en la cantina
voy a pedir billete prestado 
pa’ gastármelo todo en tequila
no me pidas que cambiar el pasado 
yo ya era así 
cabrón desde el primer día

Maluma Baby, Yeison Jiménez
De Colombia pa’l mundo parceros.

Cómo es papi?
Con el Corazón!

snippet.title: Fresquito Carnaval - Angel Guaraca
snippet.description:
TEMA: Fresquito Carnaval
Autor: Ángel Guaraca
Arreglos Musicales: Ángel Guaraca
Intérprete: Ángel Guaraca – El Inicio Cantor de América
Producción: Guaraca Internacional
Género: Carnaval

A pedido de mi querido público seguidor, pongo en vuestra consideración este hermoso tema musical interpretado en kichwa y castellano.
Espero que lo disfruten y lo hagan parte de sus celebraciones.

Derechos de Autor:
Esta canción es propiedad de El Indio Cantor de América, Ángel Guaraca.
Queda prohibida cualquier alteración total o parcial de la obra.
Se prohíbe el uso no autorizado.
Material protegido por Copyright.

Lyrics: 
On the hillside shadows chase the dawn 
Your name is carved where the wild winds have gone

Black flowers burn violet fades to grey
Still I hear your laughter tearing through the rain 

I can’t escape the storm you gave me
Constant lightning in my veins
Every echo calls your name 
Calls your name
Calls your name
Flash right back at me oh 

Always everywhere 
Always everywhere 
Yeah you’re everywhere 
Always everywhere 
Always everywhere 
Yeah you’re everywhere 

On the water your face on top of mine
A fever dream of mirrored features hungry eyes

I feel like home still you pull away
You disappear to somewhere dark
so far away

I can’t escape the storm you gave me
Constant lightning in my veins
Every echo calls your name 
Calls your name
Calls your name
Flash right back at me oh 

Always everywhere 
Always everywhere 
Yeah you’re everywhere 
Always everywhere 
Always everywhere 
Yeah you’re everywhere

#Charlixcx #AlwaysEverywhere #WutheringHeightsMovie #WutheringHeights #OfficialVideo

snippet.title: I JOINED the ANOMALIES in Scary Shawarma Kiosk..
snippet.description:
I JOINED the ANOMALIES in Scary Shawarma Kiosk..

► Join the GOOGLIVERSE 👀! -
https://www.youtube.com/@Googly?sub_confirmation=1

► Send us your FANART 🎨! -
https://www.googliverse.com

In this video Googly gets CAPTURED by the anomalies at Scary Shawarma Kiosk — but instead of attacking him, they want him to JOIN them! Googly becomes an anomaly and starts secretly feeding them through the window to make them STRONGER! When Bacon catches him fist bumping Michael Myers, Rosa sets a TRAP to expose him! But what Rosa doesn't know is… Googly's betrayal runs DEEPER than she thinks! Watch to find out what happens!

snippet.title: The Help
snippet.description: In the 1960s Mississippi, Southern society girl Skeeter returns from college with dreams of being a writer. She turns her small town on its ear by choosing to interview the Black women who have spent their lives taking care of prominent white families. Only Aibileen, the housekeeper of Skeeter's best friend, will talk at first. But as the pair continue the collaboration, more women decide to come forward, and as it turns out, they have quite a lot to say.

🎤 Lyrics: Ella Langley - Choosin' Texas

[Verse 1]
Just when I thought I got him to fall in love with Tennessee
I should've known better than to take him back to Abilene
I put him right back into her arms
I wasn't a match for that kind of spark

[Chorus]
She's from Texas, I can tell by the way
He's two-stepping 'round the room
And judging by the smile that's written on his face
There's nothing I can do
It doesn't take a crystal ball to see
A cowboy always finds a way to leave
Drinking Jack all by myself
He's choosin' Texas, I can tell

[Verse 2]
Well, I guess he forgot about the Smoky Mountain rain
Them old Hank tunes, the Memphis blues we used to sing
He always loved "Amarillo by Morning"
I should've taken that as a warning

[Chorus]
She's from Texas, I can tell by the way
He's two-stepping 'round the room
And judging by the smile that's written on his face
There's nothing I can do
It doesn't take a crystal ball to see
A cowboy always finds a way to leave
Drinking Jack all by myself
He's choosin' Texas, I can tell

[Bridge]
When I'm eastbound and down and I can't help but cry
'Cause I-40 gets lonelier with every mile
I'll know that his mind wasn't ever gonna change
'Cause his heart still belongs to the Lone Star State

[Chorus]
She's from Texas, I can tell by the way
He's two-stepping 'round the room
And judging by the smile that's written on his face
There's nothing I can do, naw, yeah
It doesn't take a crystal ball to see
A cowboy always finds a way to leave
Drinking Jack all by myself
He's choosin' Texas, I can tell, no
Drinking Jack all by myself
He's choosin' Texas, I can tell

[Outro]
Come on, baby
Oh yeah
Just when I thought I got him to fall in love with Tennessee

.........

🎤 Paroles : Ella Langley - Choosin' Texas

[Couplet 1]
Juste au moment où je pensais l'avoir fait tomber amoureux du Tennessee,

J'aurais dû me douter qu'il ne fallait pas le ramener à Abilene.

Je l'ai remis dans ses bras.

Je n'étais pas de taille face à une telle étincelle.

[Refrain]

Elle est du Texas, ça se voit.

Il se trémousse dans la pièce.

Et à en juger par son sourire… Sur son visage
Je ne peux rien faire
Pas besoin d'être devin pour voir
Un cowboy trouve toujours un moyen de partir
Je bois du Jack tout seul
Il choisit le Texas, ça se voit

[Couplet 2]
Eh bien, j'imagine qu'il a oublié la pluie des Smoky Mountains
Ces vieux airs de Hank, le blues de Memphis qu'on chantait

Il adorait « Amarillo by Morning »

J'aurais dû prendre ça comme un avertissement

[Refrain]
Elle est du Texas, ça se voit
Il danse dans la pièce
Et à en juger par le sourire qui se lit sur son visage
Je ne peux rien faire
Pas besoin d'être devin pour voir
Un cowboy trouve toujours un moyen de partir
Je bois du Jack tout seul
Il choisit le Texas, ça se voit

[Pont]
Quand je suis à l'est, au plus bas, et que je ne peux m'empêcher de pleurer

Parce que L'I-40 est de plus en plus solitaire à chaque kilomètre
Je saurai qu'il n'a jamais changé d'avis

Car son cœur appartient toujours au Texas

[Refrain]
Elle est texane, ça se voit

Il danse le two-step dans la pièce

Et à en juger par le sourire qui illumine son visage

Je n'y peux rien, non, ouais

Pas besoin d'être devin pour voir

Un cowboy trouve toujours un moyen de partir

Je bois du Jack Daniel's tout seul

Il choisit le Texas, je le sens, non

Je bois du Jack Daniel's tout seul

Il choisit le Texas, je le sens

[Outro]

Allez, bébé

Oh ouais

Juste au moment où je pensais l'avoir fait tomber amoureux du Tennessee

🎤 Liedtext: Ella Langley – Choosin' Texas

[Strophe 1]
Gerade als ich dachte, ich hätte ihn für Tennessee begeistert,
hätte ich es besser wissen müssen, als ihn zurück nach Abilene zu bringen.
Ich habe ihn direkt wieder in ihre Arme gegeben.
Ich konnte dieser Leidenschaft nichts entgegensetzen.

[Refrain]
Sie kommt aus Texas, das sehe ich ihr an.
Er tanzt durch den Raum.
Und wenn man sich ihr Lächeln so ansieht… Das steht ihm ins Gesicht geschrieben.
Ich kann nichts tun.
Man braucht keine Kristallkugel, um zu sehen:
Ein Cowboy findet immer einen Weg zu gehen.
Ich trinke Jack ganz allein.
Er will nach Texas, das merke ich.

[Strophe 2]
Tja, ich schätze, er hat den Regen in den Smoky Mountains vergessen.
Die alten Hank-Songs, den Memphis-Blues, den wir immer gesungen haben.
Er liebte immer „Amarillo by Morning“.
Ich hätte das als Warnung verstehen sollen.

[Refrain]
Sie kommt aus Texas, das merke ich an der Art.
Er tanzt im Raum herum.
Und wenn ich mir sein Lächeln so ansehe, kann ich nichts tun.
Man braucht keine Kristallkugel, um zu sehen:
Ein Cowboy findet immer einen Weg zu gehen.
Ich trinke Jack ganz allein.
Er will nach Texas, das merke ich.

[Bridge]
Wenn ich Richtung Osten fahre und am Boden zerstört bin und ich nicht anders kann, als Weinen

Denn die I-40 wird mit jedem Kilometer einsamer
Ich weiß, dass er seine Meinung nie ändern wird

Denn sein Herz gehört immer noch dem Lone Star State

[Refrain]
Sie kommt aus Texas, das sehe ich ihr an
Er tanzt im Zweischritt durch den Raum
Und wenn ich mir sein Lächeln so ansehe
Kann ich nichts tun, nein, ja
Man braucht keine Kristallkugel, um zu sehen
Ein Cowboy findet immer einen Weg zu gehen
Ich trinke Jack ganz allein
Er wählt Texas, das sehe ich
Ich trinke Jack ganz allein
Er wählt Texas, das sehe ich

[Outro]
Komm schon, Baby
Oh ja
Gerade als ich dachte, ich hätte ihn dazu gebracht, sich in Tennessee zu verlieben

.........

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ruth B. - Dandelions
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: Olympics Situation is Embarassing
snippet.description:
The Olympics has been pumping out AI slop all over social media instead of just you know, using photos from the event itself instead.
Whatever title this video ends up with is probably a little dramatic

*correction, The Stop Motion video was created by BBC Creative not The Olympics Committee, so it turns out they truly are just 100% soulless

nl-NL.description:
De Olympische Spelen hebben de sociale media overspoeld met AI-onzin in plaats van gewoon foto's van het evenement zelf te gebruiken.

De titel van deze video is waarschijnlijk een beetje overdreven.

bn.title: অলিম্পিকের পরিস্থিতি বিব্রতকর
bn.description:
অলিম্পিকে সোশ্যাল মিডিয়ায় AI-এর শ্লথতা ছড়িয়ে দেওয়া হচ্ছে, শুধু ইভেন্টের ছবি ব্যবহার করার পরিবর্তে।

এই ভিডিওটির শিরোনাম যাই হোক না কেন, সম্ভবত একটু নাটকীয়।

*সংশোধন, দ্য স্টপ মোশন ভিডিওটি অলিম্পিক কমিটি নয়, বিবিসি ক্রিয়েটিভ তৈরি করেছে, তাই দেখা যাচ্ছে যে তারা সত্যিই ১০০% আত্মাহীন।

この動画のタイトルがどうなろうと、少々大げさすぎるかもしれません。

ko.title: 올림픽 상황은 난처하다
ko.description:
올림픽 조직위원회는 실제 경기 사진을 사용하는 대신, 소셜 미디어에 AI로 만든 엉터리 영상들을 마구잡이로 쏟아내고 있습니다.
이 영상의 최종 제목이 뭐라고 하든, 아마 좀 과격한 제목일 겁니다.

*정정: 이 스톱모션 영상은 올림픽 위원회가 아니라 BBC 크리에이티브에서 제작했습니다. 결국 올림픽 위원회는 정말 영혼이 없는 존재였네요.

ml.title: ഒളിമ്പിക്‌സ് സാഹചര്യം ലജ്ജാകരമാണ്
ml.description:
ഒളിമ്പിക്സ് സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ AI സ്ലോപ്പ് പ്രചരിപ്പിക്കുകയാണ്, നിങ്ങൾക്ക് അറിയാവുന്നത് പോലെയല്ല, പകരം ഇവന്റിൽ നിന്നുള്ള ഫോട്ടോകൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നു.

ഈ വീഡിയോ ഏത് തലക്കെട്ടിൽ അവസാനിച്ചാലും അത് അല്പം നാടകീയമായിരിക്കും

*തിരുത്തൽ, സ്റ്റോപ്പ് മോഷൻ വീഡിയോ സൃഷ്ടിച്ചത് ഒളിമ്പിക്സ് കമ്മിറ്റിയല്ല, ബിബിസി ക്രിയേറ്റീവ് ആണ്, അതിനാൽ അവർ യഥാർത്ഥത്തിൽ 100% ആത്മാവില്ലാത്തവരാണെന്ന് തെളിഞ്ഞു

പോക്കിമോൻ ചാനൽ ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai

fr-FR.title: La situation aux Jeux olympiques est embarrassante.
fr-FR.description:
Les Jeux olympiques inondent les réseaux sociaux de contenus générés par IA au lieu d'utiliser des photos prises lors de l'événement.

Le titre final de cette vidéo est sans doute un peu exagéré.

*Correction : La vidéo en stop motion a été créée par BBC Creative, et non par le Comité olympique. Ils sont donc bel et bien totalement dépourvus d'âme.

ru.title: Ситуация на Олимпийских играх — позорная.
ru.description:
Олимпийские игры вместо того, чтобы просто использовать фотографии с самих соревнований, распространяют в социальных сетях всякую чушь, созданную искусственным интеллектом.
Какое бы название ни дало это видео, оно, вероятно, немного преувеличено.

*Поправка: видео в технике стоп-моушн было создано BBC Creative, а не Олимпийским комитетом, так что оказывается, они действительно на 100% бездушны.

Die Olympischen Spiele verbreiten in den sozialen Medien nur noch KI-generierten Mist, anstatt einfach Fotos vom Event selbst zu verwenden.

ta.title: ஒலிம்பிக் நிலைமை சங்கடமாக இருக்கிறது.
ta.description:
ஒலிம்பிக் போட்டி, நிகழ்வின் புகைப்படங்களைப் பயன்படுத்தி, சமூக ஊடகங்கள் முழுவதும் AI-யை பரப்பி வருகிறது.

இந்த வீடியோ எந்த தலைப்பில் முடிந்தாலும் அது கொஞ்சம் நாடகத்தனமாக இருக்கலாம்.

*திருத்தம், ஸ்டாப் மோஷன் வீடியோவை ஒலிம்பிக் கமிட்டி அல்ல, பிபிசி கிரியேட்டிவ் உருவாக்கியது, எனவே அவர்கள் உண்மையிலேயே 100% ஆன்மா இல்லாதவர்கள் என்பது தெரியவந்துள்ளது.

போகிமான் சேனல் ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai

uk.title: Ситуація з Олімпіадою є тривожною
uk.description:
Олімпіада розповсюджує соціальні мережі мотлохом штучного інтелекту, а не просто фотографіями з самої події.
Якою б не була назва цього відео, вона, мабуть, трохи драматична.

*Виправлення: відео Stop Motion було створено BBC Creative, а не Олімпійським комітетом, тож виявляється, що вони насправді на 100% бездушні.

it.title: La situazione delle Olimpiadi è imbarazzante
it.description:
Le Olimpiadi hanno sfornato cianfrusaglie di intelligenza artificiale sui social media invece di usare solo foto dell'evento stesso.
Qualunque titolo abbia scelto questo video, probabilmente è un po' troppo drammatico.

*correzione: il video in stop motion è stato creato da BBC Creative, non dal Comitato Olimpico, quindi a quanto pare sono davvero senz'anima al 100%.

Canale Pokémon ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai
Canale principale ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandarker
Secondo canale ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

id.title: Situasi Olimpiade Memalukan
id.description:
Olimpiade telah menyebarkan konten AI yang buruk di media sosial, alih-alih menggunakan foto-foto dari acara itu sendiri.
Judul apa pun yang akhirnya digunakan untuk video ini mungkin agak berlebihan.

*Koreksi, video Stop Motion dibuat oleh BBC Creative, bukan Komite Olimpiade, jadi ternyata mereka benar-benar 100% tidak punya jiwa.

Saluran Pokemon ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai
Saluran Utama ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandarker
Saluran Kedua ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

hi.title: ओलंपिक की स्थिति शर्मनाक है
hi.description:
ओलंपिक समिति ने आयोजन की तस्वीरों का इस्तेमाल करने के बजाय सोशल मीडिया पर कृत्रिम कृत्रिम वीडियो की भरमार कर दी है।
इस वीडियो का जो भी शीर्षक होगा, वह शायद थोड़ा नाटकीय होगा।

*सुधार: स्टॉप मोशन वीडियो बीबीसी क्रिएटिव ने बनाया है, ओलंपिक समिति ने नहीं। तो इससे पता चलता है कि वे सचमुच पूरी तरह से आत्माहीन हैं।

पोकेमॉन चैनल ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai
मुख्य चैनल ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandarker
दूसरा चैनल ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

es-US.title: La situación de los Juegos Olímpicos es embarazosa
es-US.description:
Los Juegos Olímpicos han estado difundiendo basura de IA por todas las redes sociales en lugar de, ya sabes, usar fotos del propio evento.
El título final de este video probablemente sea un poco dramático.

*Corrección: El video en stop motion fue creado por BBC Creative, no por el Comité Olímpico, así que resulta que son completamente desalmados.

Segundo canal ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

te.title: ఒలింపిక్స్ పరిస్థితి ఇబ్బందికరంగా ఉంది
te.description:
ఒలింపిక్స్ సోషల్ మీడియాలో AI స్లాప్‌ను ప్రసరింపజేస్తోంది, మీకు తెలిసినంత వరకు ఈవెంట్ నుండి ఫోటోలను ఉపయోగిస్తోంది.

ఈ వీడియో ఏ శీర్షికతో ముగిసినా బహుశా కొంచెం నాటకీయంగా ఉంటుంది

*సవరణ, స్టాప్ మోషన్ వీడియోను ఒలింపిక్స్ కమిటీ కాకుండా BBC క్రియేటివ్ సృష్టించింది, కాబట్టి అవి నిజంగా 100% ఆత్మలేనివని తేలింది

పోకీమాన్ ఛానల్ ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai
ప్రధాన ఛానల్ ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandarker
రెండవ ఛానల్ ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

pa.title: ਓਲੰਪਿਕ ਦੀ ਸਥਿਤੀ ਸ਼ਰਮਨਾਕ ਹੈ।
pa.description:
ਓਲੰਪਿਕਸ ਸੋਸ਼ਲ ਮੀਡੀਆ 'ਤੇ AI ਸਲੌਪ ਨੂੰ ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਜਾਣਦੇ ਹੋ, ਇਸ ਦੀ ਬਜਾਏ ਈਵੈਂਟ ਦੀਆਂ ਫੋਟੋਆਂ ਦੀ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਰਕੇ ਫੈਲਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ।

ਇਸ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਦੇ ਅੰਤ ਵਿੱਚ ਜੋ ਵੀ ਸਿਰਲੇਖ ਹੋਵੇ ਉਹ ਸ਼ਾਇਦ ਥੋੜ੍ਹਾ ਨਾਟਕੀ ਹੋਵੇ

*ਸੁਧਾਰ, ਦ ਸਟਾਪ ਮੋਸ਼ਨ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਓਲੰਪਿਕ ਕਮੇਟੀ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਨਹੀਂ ਸਗੋਂ ਬੀਬੀਸੀ ਕਰੀਏਟਿਵ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਗਿਆ ਸੀ, ਇਸ ਲਈ ਇਹ ਪਤਾ ਚਲਦਾ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਉਹ ਸੱਚਮੁੱਚ 100% ਆਤਮਾਹੀਣ ਹਨ

pl.title: Sytuacja na igrzyskach olimpijskich jest żenująca
pl.description:
Igrzyska Olimpijskie zalewają media społecznościowe sztucznymi bzdurami, zamiast po prostu, no wiesz, wykorzystywać zdjęcia z samego wydarzenia.
Tytuł tego filmu jest prawdopodobnie nieco dramatyczny.

*poprawka: film poklatkowy został stworzony przez BBC Creative, a nie przez Komitet Olimpijski, więc okazuje się, że są oni po prostu w 100% bezduszni.

ar.title: الوضع في الألعاب الأولمبية محرج
ar.description:
تُغرق الألعاب الأولمبية مواقع التواصل الاجتماعي بمقاطع فيديو رديئة بتقنية الذكاء الاصطناعي، بدلاً من استخدام صور حقيقية من الحدث نفسه.

مهما كان عنوان هذا الفيديو، فهو على الأرجح مُبالغ فيه بعض الشيء.

*تنويه: فيديو ستوب موشن من إنتاج قسم الإبداع في بي بي سي، وليس اللجنة الأولمبية، ما يُثبت أنهم يفتقرون تمامًا للروح.

قناة بوكيمون ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai
القناة الرئيسية ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandarker
القناة الثانية ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

pt-BR.title: A situação das Olimpíadas é constrangedora.
pt-BR.description:
As Olimpíadas têm espalhado por aí conteúdo de IA de baixa qualidade nas redes sociais, em vez de, sabe, usar fotos do próprio evento.
O título que esse vídeo vai ter provavelmente será um pouco dramático.

*Correção: o vídeo em stop motion foi criado pela BBC Creative, não pelo Comitê Olímpico. Então, no fim das contas, eles são 100% sem alma.

Canal de Pokémon ► https://www.youtube.com/@dolandarkrai
Canal Principal ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandarker
Segundo Canal ► https://www.youtube.com/c/dolandark

iw.title: המצב באולימפיאדה מביך
iw.description:
האולימפיאדה פיזרה שטויות של בינה מלאכותית בכל רחבי הרשתות החברתיות במקום להשתמש רק בתמונות מהאירוע עצמו.
לא משנה איזו כותרת יש לסרטון הזה, זה כנראה קצת דרמטי.

*תיקון, סרטון הסטופ מושן נוצר על ידי BBC Creative ולא על ידי הוועדה האולימפית, אז מסתבר שהם באמת פשוט חסרי נשמה ב-100%.

snippet.description:

🔔 Activa las notificaciones para enterarte de los nuevos vídeos!

📧Para promociones: malibumusicpromotions@gmail.com

https://youtu.be/0ElD2qJ5ZoU?si=2iI-ofXUmLI9q0ZT

📝 Letra/ Lyrics:
Cómo le explico al corazón que quieres irte
Si tienes duda mami no te estoy mintiendo
Mira mis ojos mientras mi alma se desviste
Los que miras justo cuando me estoy viniendo

Cómo quisiera que estuvieras aquí
Me sintieras a mí, al ladito tuyo
Pa’ que veas que yo no puedo fingir, y me puedo morir por los besos tuyos

Cómo quisiera que estuvieras aquí
Me sintieras a mí, al ladito tuyo
Pa’ que veas que yo no puedo fingir, y me puedo morir por los besos tuyos

Ven quédate, quédate
No puedo estar sin ti
Quédate, quédate
No puedo estar sin ti,

♪♪♪

Quédate, no puedo estar sin ti

Este que está aquí, a ti no te quiere dejar,
Este que está aquí, también se deja llevar
Tamo’ destinados a juntos celebrar la Navidad
Esto nunca tuvo sentido, fuimos en contra de la Ley Universal

Qué visaje, cule’ viaje
Dime cómo evitamos las señales
A veces yo quisiera que no pare
Pero esto me va a matar

Quiero ver qué responde, no me tira ni “hola!”
Y, yo aquí con cule’ bartola
Pensando en toda’ las noche’ que estuvimos a solas y
 no le parábamos bolas

Chingando con un fillin’ somos Rey de las olas
Estoy enfrente a tu alma, por fa Ma’ déjame entrar,
Permíteme que entienda’ que no existe nadie más
Y si me quedo contigo es porque tú eres la mondá

Ven quédate, quédate
No puedo estar sin ti

Quédate, quédate
No puedo estar sin ti,

Quédate,quédate
No puedo estar sin ti

Quédate,
No puedo estar sin ti

snippet.title: How I RUINED Mojang's OFFICIAL Event
snippet.description:
Honestly the minions DLC was fire I'm not even gonna lie
CHECK OUT THE SQUIDSWAG POSTER... ➡️➡️https://creatormerch.com/products/squidswag

So Mojang (the real Mojang) wanted us to celebrate the spears and basically just told us to host this fun event... But the catch is, to win you have to kill as many MOBS as possible- and perhaps even PLAYERS. Silly shenanigans ensue yeah ENJOY :D 
They didn't pay me to make this video I just thought it was funny :P shoutout to the kindness of my friends for letting me win by doing nothing so I could roleplay  as gru!!!!!! featuring @jumperwho @Pangi @ashswag @jojosolos @SB737 @PrinceZam 

MORE SQUIDDO STUFF:
👕 https://squiddostore.com
🐦 https://twitter.com/TheRealSquiddo
👾 https://discord.gg/squiddo
📺 https://twitch.tv/therealsquiddo
🌙SQUIDDO CLOAK https://store.lunarclient.com/category/therealsquiddo 🌙

snippet.title: They're finally getting what they deserve
snippet.description:
https://starforgepc.com/LegendarydropsSF
Support future videos: https://www.patreon.com/legendarydrops
► Business Inquiries: legendarydrops@mythictalent.com
► https://kick.com/legendarydrops
► My Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/legendary_drops
► The Discord: https://discord.gg/6BDVvA7uuZ
► My Twitter: https://twitter.com/ALegendaryDrops
#gaming #legendarydrops #indiegame #indie 
Thanks for watching!

On this channel, you’ll find long-form video essays about gaming’s biggest stories from studio collapses and corporate greed to the creative risks that still push the medium forward. I break down industry trends, publisher decisions, and the economics behind how games are made, marketed, and sold.

Whether it’s GTA 6, Elden Ring, Baldur's Gate 3, Path of Exile 2, Call of Duty, Battlefield, Pokémon, or the next doomed live-service experiment, I cover how the industry’s biggest names keep shaping and breaking the games we play. 

From deep dive analysis on publishers like EA, Bungie, Blizzard, Activision, Ubisoft, Sony, and Microsoft to commentary on indie hits like Palworld and Expedition 33, every video cuts through the marketing to get to what actually matters: how this industry works, who it’s failing, and why players deserve better.

snippet.title: The Invincible Soviet Tank Killer
snippet.description:
Soviet tanks in War Thunder are infamous for their inability to aim down, but there is a strange Cold War prototype TD that is the exception. The IT-1 ATGM carrier can depress nine degrees and is essentially invincible while hull down. After Gaijin changed ATGM controls it's very goofy to use, but still a lot of fun.

Check the channel "About" section for the link to the creator of my profile picture.

Songs used (in order from first to last):
Various Halo Soundtracks

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/spookston

#warthundertanks #warthunder​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #warthundergameplay
The Invincible Soviet Tank Killer

snippet.title: Ne-Yo - So Sick (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ne-Yo - So Sick (Lyrics)

Ne-Yo:
https://instagram.com/neyo
https://open.spotify.com/artist/21E3waRsmPlU7jZsS13rcj

Ne-Yo - So Sick Lyrics:

[Intro]
Mmm, mmm, yeah
Do, do, do, do, do, do, do-do
Ooh, yeah

[Verse 1]
Gotta change my answering machine
Now that I'm alone
'Cause right now it says that we
Can't come to the phone
And I know it makes no sense
'Cause you walked out the door
But it's the only way I hear your voice anymore

[Pre-Chorus]
(It's ridiculous)
It's been months
And for some reason I just (Can't get over us)
And I'm stronger than this, yeah (Enough is enough)
No more walking 'round with my head down (Yeah)
I'm so over being blue
Cryin' over you

[Chorus]
And I'm so sick of love songs, so tired of tears
So done with wishin' you were still here
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow
So why can't I turn off the radio?

[Verse 2]
Gotta fix that calendar I have
That's marked July 15th
Because since there's no more you
There's no more anniversary
I'm so fed up with my thoughts of you
And your memory
And how every song reminds me of what used to be
That's the reason

[Chorus]
I'm so sick of love songs, so tired of tears
So done with wishin' you were still here
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow
So why can't I turn off the radio?

[Bridge]
(Oh, leave me alone) Leave me alone
(Stupid love songs) Oh-oh, hey
Don't make me think about her smile
Or having my first child
I'm letting go
Turning off the radio

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm so sick of love songs (Hey), so tired of tears (So tired of tears)
So done with wishin' she were still here (Oh)
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow (Ooh, oh)
So why can't I turn off the radio? (Why can't I turn off the radio?)
And I'm so sick of love songs, so tired of tears (So tired of tears)
So done with wishing she were still here
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow (Hey)
Why can't I turn off the radio? (Why can't I turn off the radio?)
And I'm so sick of love songs (So sick of love songs)
So tired of tears (And I'm so sick, so sick of love song)
So done with wishing you were still here
(And I'm so sick, so sick of love songs)
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow (Hey)
So why can't I turn off the radio?

[Outro]
Why can't I turn off the radio?
Why can't I turn off the radio?

Ne-Yo - So Sick (Lyrics)

Aquí tiro la toalla
El romance y la pasión no es para mí
(Yo por amor)

Sin temor a una avalancha y me caí
Que mueran las novelas de amor

Y al carajito de la flecha me caí mal

snippet.title: Metro Boomin, The Weeknd, 21 Savage - Creepin' (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Metro Boomin, The Weeknd, 21 Savage - Creepin'
🎧 Listen/Download: https://open.spotify.com/track/2dHHgzDwk4BJdRwy9uXhTO
🔔 Subscribe to get updates on new uploads!

➡️ Metro Boomin
https://open.spotify.com/artist/0iEtIxbK0KxaSlF7G42ZOp
https://www.instagram.com/metroboomin

➡️ The Weeknd
https://open.spotify.com/artist/1Xyo4u8uXC1ZmMpatF05PJ
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd

➡️ 21 Savage
https://open.spotify.com/artist/1URnnhqYAYcrqrcwql10ft

📲 Connect with SoundKream: 
http://soundkream.io

Follow us on Spotify: 
http://spotify.soundkream.io

🎤 Lyrics:

Oooh,
Just can't believe this man
(Metro Boomin want some more --)
Somebody said they saw you
The person you were kissing wasn't me
And I would never ask you, I just kept it to myself
I don't wanna know, if you're playing me
Keep it on the low
Cause my heart can't take it anymore
And if you creeping, please don't let it show
Oh baby, I don't wanna know
I think about it when I hold you
When looking in your eyes, I can't believe
And I don't need to know the truth
But baby keep it to yourself
I don't wanna know, if you're playing me
Keep it on the low
Cause my heart can't take it anymore
And if you creeping, please don't let it show
Oh baby, I don't wanna know
Did he touch you better than me? (touch you better than me?)
Did he watch you fall asleep (watch you fall asleep?)
Did you show him all those things that you used to do to me?
If you're better off that way (better off that way)
Baby all that I can say (all that I can say)
If you're gonna do your thing, then don't come back to me
Ooh
Woah, woah, woah
21
Had me crushing, I was cuffing like the precinct
How you go from housewife to a sneaky link
Got you ridin round in all types of benz's and rovers
Girl you used to ride in a rinky dink
I'm the one put you in Eliante (on God)
Fashion Nova model, I put you on the runway (on God)
You was rocking coach bags, got you chanaynay
Side --in frisco, I call her my bae bae (21)
I got a girl but I still feel alone
If you playing me that mean my home aint home
Having nightmares of going through your phone (21)
Can't even record you got me out my zone
I don't wanna know, if you're playing me
Keep it on the low
Cause my heart can't take it anymore
And if you creeping, please don't let it show
Oh baby
I don't wanna know, if you're playing me
Keep it on the low
Cause my heart can't take it anymore
And if you creeping, please don't let it show
Oh baby I don't wanna know
If you creeping just don't let me find out (on God)
Get a hotel never bring him to the house (on God)
If you're better off that way (better off that way)
Baby all that I can say (all that I can say)
If you're gonna do your thing, then don't come back to me

🏷 Tags:
#metroboomin #theweeknd #21savage #creepin #lyrics

snippet.title: Six Invitational 2026 | Finals - Day 9
snippet.description:
The Six Invitational is the world championship of Rainbow Six Siege, where legacies are defined, dynasties are forged, and only the strongest teams earn a place in Siege history 🏆

20 of the best teams from around the world compete for a massive $3,000,000 USD prize pool and the right to be crowned the greatest Rainbow Six Siege team on the planet 💰

The tournament is played across three intense stages, with only the very best surviving each phase. After weeks of competition, the final matches take place live on the main stage at the Adidas Arena in Paris 🇫🇷🏟️

In the end, only one team will remain. Only one will lift the legendary Hammer, the trophy awarded to the undisputed world champions of Rainbow Six Siege 🔨

See you at the Adidas Arena in Paris, France 🇫🇷
February 13–15, 2026.

Catch all our matches:
► Twitch: http://www.twitch.tv/rainbow6
► YouTube VODs: https://www.youtube.com/c/RainbowSixEsportsMatchVods

 Follow us on social media:
► Twitter Global: https://twitter.com/R6Esports
► Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/r6esports/
► Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/rainbow6
► YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/RainbowSixEsports
► Official website: https://www.ubisoft.com/en-us/esports/rainbow-six/siege

snippet.title: Hollow Knight Switch 2 Version! LIVE! Revisiting The Magic
snippet.description:
Hollow Knight is a 2017 Metroidvania video game developed and published by Australian independent developer Team Cherry. The player controls a nameless insectoid warrior in exploring Hallownest, a fallen kingdom plagued by a supernatural disease. Tonight we're revisiting the magic. 

Donations are 100% Optional and Never Donate More Than You Can Afford Please: https://streamlabs.com/beaconofnick/tip

My Cologne: https://www.amazon.com/Azzaro-Wanted-Parfum-Intense-Cologne/dp/B08ZFKB8ZK/ref=sr_1_6_pp?crid=2VBXVQWUV236R&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.wwHY27bewjUV-orESDZdu5cItaCO5yTm5XqyQNOvR28DrSJafvMN8nYMkREOdYCPMsiSKpKUsyWKodic6Kw9JHxf2U2AWa_4OKHon2kYyuYrXZQF5f4aOJkhPzW3xfLWU4XfLRrPxLJ8FQ8qKY35nRmE4wPPNh0kQGx2F-WN2d8Js10Xc3oNJCbXkn4dLs7LHFUrt5znkfqrLSM7LQQrd5My8KN7d0j6bLW93ez0pF5sv8SNnb4CBQMhTsY3gCZA23VMcU-4yNBW1cCWibmS5ZxYfmLlDi37wGW1PfYeFvQ.I6jJi83o_azCwDcVnYf1nAkR3tElrzcb3lAgqP_pTI0&dib_tag=se&keywords=cologne&qid=1770375393&sprefix=cologn%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-6&th=1

Rules For The Chat: 
 1. Be Respectful to Mods and Everyone
 2. Please keep the chat PG
 3. No Self Promo
 4. No Spamming the chat or backseating
 5. No Spoilers about this game, Scarlet and Violet or about new movies/shows
6. Moderators are essentially extensions of myself. Please listen to them.
7.You must flip a pancake IRL every time Nick gets Splatted in Splatoon or gets a shiny (This one is a joke)
8. Please understand Nick is one person and do not accuse him of ignoring you.

Music by: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3jXokTqt0bc&t=882s

en.title: Hollow Knight Switch 2 Version! LIVE! Revisiting The Magic
en.description:
Hollow Knight is a 2017 Metroidvania video game developed and published by Australian independent developer Team Cherry. The player controls a nameless insectoid warrior in exploring Hallownest, a fallen kingdom plagued by a supernatural disease. Tonight we're revisiting the magic. 

Donations are 100% Optional and Never Donate More Than You Can Afford Please: https://streamlabs.com/beaconofnick/tip

My Cologne: https://www.amazon.com/Azzaro-Wanted-Parfum-Intense-Cologne/dp/B08ZFKB8ZK/ref=sr_1_6_pp?crid=2VBXVQWUV236R&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.wwHY27bewjUV-orESDZdu5cItaCO5yTm5XqyQNOvR28DrSJafvMN8nYMkREOdYCPMsiSKpKUsyWKodic6Kw9JHxf2U2AWa_4OKHon2kYyuYrXZQF5f4aOJkhPzW3xfLWU4XfLRrPxLJ8FQ8qKY35nRmE4wPPNh0kQGx2F-WN2d8Js10Xc3oNJCbXkn4dLs7LHFUrt5znkfqrLSM7LQQrd5My8KN7d0j6bLW93ez0pF5sv8SNnb4CBQMhTsY3gCZA23VMcU-4yNBW1cCWibmS5ZxYfmLlDi37wGW1PfYeFvQ.I6jJi83o_azCwDcVnYf1nAkR3tElrzcb3lAgqP_pTI0&dib_tag=se&keywords=cologne&qid=1770375393&sprefix=cologn%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-6&th=1

Rules For The Chat: 
 1. Be Respectful to Mods and Everyone
 2. Please keep the chat PG
 3. No Self Promo
 4. No Spamming the chat or backseating
 5. No Spoilers about this game, Scarlet and Violet or about new movies/shows
6. Moderators are essentially extensions of myself. Please listen to them.
7.You must flip a pancake IRL every time Nick gets Splatted in Splatoon or gets a shiny (This one is a joke)
8. Please understand Nick is one person and do not accuse him of ignoring you.

snippet.title: Spending $8,595,697 For The ARCADE LUCKY BLOCK..
snippet.description:
Today I spent money for the new arcade lucky blocks in escape tsunami for brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Highguard Was Destined to Fail and it's a Shame...
snippet.description:
Welp they just announced mass layoffs at the developers Wildlight Entertainment. You really hate to see it. Highguard had actual potential and could've tapped into a very niche genre of game that is WILDLY underrated, the FPS-RTS. Instead, the game has played it very safe, is radically unfinished and seems to be going down the same path as concord, it's a real shame...

SUPPORT my Channel ► https://www.patreon.com/TheActMan

✪ CONNECT WITH ME ✪
Subscribe ↪ https://www.youtube.com/c/TheActMan?sub_confirmation=1
Twitch ➤ https://www.twitch.tv/theactingmale
Twitter ➤ https://twitter.com/TheActMan_YT
Act Man TV ➤ http://bit.ly/2kPXk7f 

Discord ➤ https://discord.gg/yBABtkh 
Instagram ➤ https://www.instagram.com/theactman_yt/

____TIME STAMPS____
Intro - 0:00
The good of Highguard - 4:39
Why no Early Access? - 5:58
The AWFUL Reveal - 6:34
Highguard is incomplete - 9:08
Mandatory Tutorial - 11:56
Maps and Base Building - 12:54
What could have been - 14:23
UI and Competitive Integrity - 15:29
More missteps - 22:07
Conclusion - 23:30

सोनी और प्लेस्टेशन ने स्टेट ऑफ प्ले स्ट्रीम का आयोजन किया, जिसमें नए पीसी और पीएस5 गेम्स के साथ-साथ मेटल गियर, गॉड ऑफ वॉर और कई अन्य गेम्स की झलकियाँ दिखाई गईं।

~~

इंस्टाग्राम पर मुझे फॉलो करें: https://www.instagram.com/jakebaldino/
एक्सप्लेनेशन पर मुझे फॉलो करें: https://x.com/JakeBaldino

मेरा नया फ्रेंड्स पर सेकंड पॉडकास्ट देखें: https://linktr.ee/friendspersecond

es-US.title: sobre ESE estado de cosas...
es-US.description:
Sony y PlayStation presentaron una transmisión de State of Play que reveló nuevos juegos para PC y PS5, además de adelantos de Metal Gear, God of War y muchos más.
~~

Sígueme en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jakebaldino/
Sígueme en X: https://x.com/JakeBaldino

No te pierdas mi nuevo podcast Friends Per Second: https://linktr.ee/friendspersecond

en.title: about THAT State of Play...
en.description:
Sony and PlayStation hosted a State of Play stream revealing new PC and new PS5 games as well as looks at Metal Gear, God of War, and a bunch more.
~~

snippet.title: Master the MOST powerful Stratagem in Helldivers
snippet.description:
Today we're taking a look at helldivers most powerful stratagem, the TD-220 Bastion Tank. But getting the most out of it requires at least two helldivers working together, so let me show y'all how by covering the loadouts, tactics, and teamplay required to get crew your tank like an expert. 

Join....the Discord: https://discord.gg/kaiscommandos

Support me on Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/commissarkai

Grab some sweet merch: https://commissarkai-shop.fourthwall.com/
